name: tower-baton
description: BUILD-010 Tower baton MVP — the automated baton-carrier + read-only Codex QA reviewer that replaces Warwick's copy-paste QA relay. Larry posts a checkpoint to ClickUp; Tower detects it, verifies GitHub evidence bound to the exact head SHA, runs a read-only Codex QA turn against the approved brief + fingerprinted QA skill, and posts a compact [TOWER -> LARRY] reply back to the same thread. No Supabase, no ftw, no autonomous merge. Pure Node; zero runtime dependencies.
